description: This Java interface defines a Spring Data JPA repository for managing EmailVerificationToken entities, including custom query methods to find tokens by their string token value and delete tokens associated with a specific user ID.

classes.name: EmailVerificationTokenRepository
classes.description: Spring Data JPA repository interface for EmailVerificationToken entities, providing basic CRUD operations and custom methods for token lookup and deletion.

methods.name: findByToken
methods.description: Finds an EmailVerificationToken entity by its token string.

methods.name: deleteByUserId
methods.description: Deletes email verification tokens associated with a specific user ID.
